name: Marc Vidal
summary: Dedicated Frontend Engineer with over 5 years of experience building responsive and accessible web applications. Passionate about clean code, performance optimization, and creating seamless user experiences using modern JavaScript frameworks.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
experience.description: Leading the migration of legacy internal tools to React and TypeScript, resulting in a 30% improvement in page load times and enhanced developer productivity.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.description: Developed and maintained high-traffic e-commerce storefronts using Vue.js and Tailwind CSS, collaborating closely with UX designers to implement complex UI components.

experience.title: Junior Frontend Engineer
experience.description: Assisted in the development of client-facing dashboards using HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JavaScript, focusing on cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering
